Hero.title: Your entire event, in one place.
Hero.subtitle: Design, send, and manage your guest confirmations — all from your phone, in under 5 minutes.
Hero.trust: No credit card · Ready in minutes · +10,000 events across Argentina
Hero.imageAlt: Elegant event decoration, example of personalized digital invitation
Hero.whatsappMessage: Hi! 👋 Can you help me make my digital invitation?

Categories.title: Categories we work with
Categories.description: Unique designs for every type of celebration. Choose your category and customize every detail to create the perfect invitation.

steps.title: Choose your design
steps.description: Pick from over 200 designer-made templates. Rustic wedding, modern quinceañera, kids birthday — there's something for every style.

steps.title: Customize the details
steps.description: Edit the text, photos, music and colors — no design or tech knowledge needed. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use Bento.

steps.title: Share with your guests
steps.description: Send the link via WhatsApp or Instagram. Each guest confirms with a tap and you see confirmations in real time, without calling anyone.

Features.title: What does your invitation include?
Features.description: Each invitation comes with all the tools you need to create a memorable experience for your guests

features.title: Invitations that impress
features.description: Your guests won't believe a digital invitation can look this good. Animations, premium typography and unique designs for every event type.

features.title: Real-time confirmations
features.description: Know exactly who's coming and who isn't, without calling anyone. Your guest list updated instantly, from any phone.

features.title: Share anywhere
features.description: One link that works on WhatsApp, Instagram, email or wherever. No apps, no downloads, no friction for your guests.

features.title: Collaborative playlist
features.description: Let your guests add the songs they want to hear. The event DJ, chosen by everyone.

Features.benefitsDescription: Our comprehensive service ensures you have everything you need to create the perfect invitation without extra worries.
benefits: Instant delivery via WhatsApp or email
Features.experienceDescription: Everything you need to create unforgettable moments
